name: Cinnamon extract
summary: Decision-ready summary: Cinnamon extract is best framed for blood glucose support; insulin sensitivity support; safety screen: liver disease; anticoagulant medication caution; pregnancy high-dose caution.
description: Cinnamon extract supports glucose metabolism, plausibly via insulin sensitivity and carbohydrate handling; evidence is mixed but mechanistic signals are relevant.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v9.2: Meta-analyses report mixed but potentially favorable glycemic effects; keep claims conservative.
claimMap.notes: v9.2: Meta-analyses report mixed but potentially favorable glycemic effects; keep claims conservative.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: Cinnamon trial doses vary; commonly 1–6 g/day powder or extract-equivalent in diabetes trials

sources.title: PubMed PMID 37818728. Minimal citation row added from existing workbook PMID; title/year/journal still require PubMed metadata extraction.
